title: delegation — validation rules
description: Custom Laravel validation rules published by DelegationServiceProvider::boot() so FormRequests / Data classes can validate delegation + impersonation payloads. Every rule below carries a public identifier that the observer + policy layer also invoke as a service — the rule + the observer share a single implementation.

rules.name: valid_delegation_window
rules.description: Validates the (starts_at, ends_at) pair on a role_delegations payload: starts_at >= now(); ends_at > starts_at; ends_at <= starts_at + config('delegation.role_delegations.max_days'). Fails with a specific message per constraint (starts_at_in_past, ends_before_start, window_exceeds_cap).
rules.default_message: The :attribute is not a valid delegation window (:reason).

rules.name: delegator_holds_role
rules.description: Validates that the caller (or the explicit delegator_field on the payload) currently holds the role_id being delegated within the current tenant + application. When role_id is null (all-roles OOF), the check is trivially true. Consults RBAC's PermissionResolver.

params.name: delegator_field
params.description: Field on the payload whose value is the delegator User's ULID. Defaults to `delegator_id` — override when validating an admin-on-behalf-of flow.

rules.default_message: The :attribute delegator does not hold role :role.

rules.name: same_tenant_delegation
rules.description: Validates that the delegate (identified by the delegate_field on the payload) belongs to the same tenant as the delegator (or the current caller's tenant when delegator_field is absent). Refuses cross-tenant delegation.
rules.default_message: The :attribute must belong to the same tenant as the delegator.

rules.name: impersonation_ttl_within_bounds
rules.description: Validates the requested (started_at, ends_at) span on an impersonation session payload. ends_at <= started_at + config('delegation.impersonation.max_minutes') by default; ends_at <= started_at + config('delegation.impersonation.max_minutes_extended') when the target tenant holds impersonation_extended_ttl entitlement AND the caller is a super_admin.
rules.default_message: The :attribute exceeds the maximum impersonation TTL (max :max_minutes minutes; extended cap :max_minutes_extended when entitled).

rules.name: impersonation_reason_min_length
rules.description: Validates the reason field on an impersonation session payload meets the min length (default 40 chars — heavier than delegation's 20). Multibyte-aware via mb_strlen.
rules.default_message: The :attribute must be at least :min characters (impersonation requires a substantive reason).
